name: Lee Bora

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Darkness Emission
basic.description: Bora swings her staff and unleashes the power of darkness. Deals Dark elemental damage.

core.name: Tracking Charm
core.description: Bora attacks the enemy by throwing numerous explosive charms. Deals Dark elemental damage. Applies Airborne effect on hit.

skill.name: Strengthening Charm
skill.description: Bora throws a strengthening charm and unfolds an Enhancement Circle that enhances her Phantom Foxes. Deals Dark elemental damage. Creates Enhancement Circle zone for 210 seconds. Removes Debuff Zone in landing area. Enhancement Circle: +10% Dark damage for team; +20% Phantom Fox magic arrow damage with penetration.

skill.name: Summoning Charm: Phantom Foxes
skill.description: Bora summons Phantom Foxes that fire magic arrows. Deals Dark elemental damage. Phantom Foxes deal 400–600% ATK magic arrow damage, lasting 12 seconds.

support.name: Quick Attack: Tempest
support.description: Bora summons a binding divination circle and pulls enemies into its center. Deals Dark elemental damage. Applies Charm effect (15% increased damage taken, 15-second duration). Removes Debuff Zone in area.

qte.name: Tempest
qte.description: Bora summons a binding divination circle and pulls enemies into its center. Deals Dark elemental damage. Usage Conditions: Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate Skill, Stun, or Blind. Applies Airborne effect.

ultimate.name: Dark Charm: Meg
ultimate.description: Bora uses the sealed Dark Charm to free the giant summoned beast, Meg. Deals Dark elemental damage. Final hit applies Knock Down.

passive.name: Charm
passive.description: When Core Attack or Tempest hits, the user applies the [Charm] effect to the target. [Charm]: The target's damage taken increases by 15%. Duration: 15 seconds.

advancements: [Phantom Foxes] effect change: 3 foxes summoned with 80% increased damage each.
+6% Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit damage; +2% Dark team members' Critical Hit damage per Dark ally.
[Strengthening Charm] usable 2 times with 40% range/damage increase; grants 5% Attack and 5% max HP to Dark team for 10 sec (stacks 2x).
25% [Dark Charm: Meg] cooldown reduction; 30% damage reduction for Dark team members.
75% small Meg damage increase; [Immortal] for 2 sec if HP ≤1 within [Enhancement Circle]; regains 50% Attack HP when ending (once per battle).
